upsert.meaning: from here on forever; all the way ahead
forever from now on; from here on too
up to now as well, all along
much later; at a far later point
since long ago; for a long time already
to turn; to spin; to rotate something
to turn; to go around; to rotate
to come off; to be disconnected; to miss
seems fun; looks like enjoying it

upsert.reading: はがねのれんきんじゅつし

upsert.meaning: still all this time even now
newly designed edition; reissue with new cover/layout
to run/drive too fast; to overdo running
lost item; something one is looking for
recovery; making up for a loss or mistake
